feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud, connectivity
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud, connectivity Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Email notification when the import job gets refreshed in SAC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Is there a way to get email notifications when the import job gets refreshed ( I mean import job gets success or failure) in SAC.

Appreciate for the quick response.

Thank you

entry.title: Schediling publication SAC: You weren't logged on to the remote data source
entry.content:
Hi,

Since today we have enough licenses to schedule publication from SAC and I am getting this error:

You weren't logged on to the remote data source

Info: You weren't logged on to the remote data source automatically. Please ask your administrator to verify the SAML Single Sign-On configuration for connection BRW.

I am trying to understand where is the problem, but I cannot find a log with the error.

We have the following things:

1. Live connection to BW 7.50 on Hana

2. SSO to BW using Okta IdP - the connection is valid and is being used by now for accessing data in stories

3. Cloud connector 2.16.0 installed with the whole SAC Kit - the CC is set up according to the instructions for using Advanced features with live connection but I don't know if it is correct. By now we have been using only live connection and the scheduling is the first thing to test the CC. We've changed the default UI certificate with one from DigiCert and also activated Tomcat for SSL. As I said before, I am not sure if the settings are correct. The subaccount from SAC is added to CC and a connection to BW using HTTPS as well. Our BW is also using DigiCert certificate. In fact, in CC everything looks green.

4. The connection in SAC is marked to use advanced features

Could anyone, please, tell me where might be the problem or where to find helpful logs?

entry.title: Export data from SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

does anyone know if there is any way to save data directly from SAC story to BigQuery?

Let's say somebody makes a change to a table that links to SAC model and then when they press the button in the story, that change is being reflected in the bigquery table. 

Thank you in advance, any advice is greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Currency to be removed from column (SAC Live Data Model)
entry.content: I am trying to remove INR and Nos from the SAC Live Data Model, but I am not able to find the option to hide it. How can we hide it from the report?

entry.title: Email Notification If the Job finished successfully in Data Actions in SAC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Just to wanted to know, if there is any feasibility to get email notifications upon successful completion of job in Data Actions. If so, what are the steps to configure to get this email notifications.

Please find below the screenshot for the same.

Appreciate for Quick response. Thank you.

entry.title: How I can merge member cell sap sac ?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Have request to show only 1 line total for every combination in table. 

I have Project and Deliverable Dimension. Each project might have 3 deliverables.

Showing them in table will lead to showing 3 lines which I dont want. I need to show only in 1 line. 

Any workaround or idea how to solve this ?

entry.title: In Analytics stories, How one should copy canvas created ?
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am creating analytics stories & I have created canvas to display some charts. I would like to copy that canvas, but I am not able to do. I can see the option copy/duplicate, but it is greyed out.

Thanks,
Abhishek

entry.title: Dynamic Date Filter Issue in a Story Based on Live Connection Model [SAC]
entry.content:
Hi all, we are trying to create a story using the ACTIVITY_LOG model which is a live model within SAC that is used to show info in the system overview.

Using this model as base, we created a story(2.0), in it we have a table, measures and dimensions from the model were selected and data is displayed, but when the date filter is set using "Date(Range)", no data is visible, were as when a date filter is set using "Date(Member)" data is visible, so is there any limitation in setting a range date filter when the story is based on a liver model. What we wanted was to set the filter for date dynamically to show the previous 30 days of data using the system date as the base.

Any help in this regard would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Story report issue
entry.content:
Hi all,

we meet an issue at existing Story reports for few days: 

We can run story report, but in each component (table) we cant´t see data but only an error

"An error occurred while fetching the list of members."

Do you know what can be a root of this issue a and how to solve it?

Thanks, Míša

entry.title: Re: Connection between SAP SAC and Datasphere
SAC Deployments via APIs
entry.content:
Hello Everyone

Within our project, we are trying to create automated deployment pipelines via Jenkins on SAC, to move the content (Models and Stories) across environments.

I went through below links and created relevant API calls using Basic Authentication:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ANALYTICS_CLOUD/14cac91febef464dbb1efce20e3f1613/3ccfab3348dd407db089accb66cff9a2.html

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-analytics-cloud-apis-getting-started-guide/ba-p/13385812

We created a sequential workflow and executed the API workflow using Postman from Windows and were successful in transporting content across tenants.

Steps followed are as below : 

1.  Configure a Client under App Integration in the Administration area with all acceses.

2. Get access token :

3. get Stories and Models

4. Create post request and pass the Authentication header and XS-CSRF token from previous API

5.  Do an Export Job from Source tenant

6. Run/Execute the Import Job in target tenant using Job ID from step 5 

ABove steps were successful when we did it manually from Postman, but when we tried the same using Curl Commands from Linux server based Jenkins, we are failing at Step 4 with the error:  XS-csrf token not valid.

Tried manually passing the above mentioned token from linux server and still didnt work.

Our Network Environment:  1. There is an IAFA proxy (Internet access proxy)

2. No proxy used to connect to SAC from Postman

Please find below Curl Commands for connection to API and the error message in screenshot attached.

Looking forward for some valuable feedback here.

### Step 1: get access token
curl --location --request POST "${SAC_AUTH_URL}/oauth/token?grant_type=client_credentials" --header "Authorization: Basic ${SAC_AUTH_TOKEN_PSW}" >${TOKEN_RESPONSE_JSON}
We get a proper return, so we can extract $SAC_ACCESS_TOKEN

### Step 2: get stories and models
curl -s -D ${SAC_RESPONSE_HEADER} -x ${USE_PROXY} --location --request GET "${SAC_API_URL}/stories?include=models" --header "Authorization: Bearer ${SAC_ACCESS_TOKEN}" --header "x-sap-sac-custom-auth: true" --header "x-csrf-token: fetch" >${SAC_RESULT_FILE}
Access works fine, we get a json file with the stories and models
we can extract $CSRF_TOKEN from the responsheader by grep "x-csrf-token:"

 

### Step 3: request export job with CSRF token and SAC_ACCESS_TOKEN
curl -D ${SAC_RESPONSE_HEADER} --location "${SAC_API_URL}/content/jobs" --header "x-sap-sac-custom-auth: true" --header "x-csrf-token: ${SAC_CSRF_TOKEN}" --header "Content-Type: application/json" --header "Authorization: Bearer ${SAC_ACCESS_TOKEN}" -d @${JOB_EXPORT_JSON} >${SAC_RESPONSE_FILE}
access is denied

Error Message: 

{"timestamp":"2024-03-25T12:19:13.902+00:00","status":403,"error":"Forbidden","path":"/api/v1/content/jobs"}

x-csrf-token: Required
x-frame-options: DENY

Br

Harsh Garg

entry.title: SAP SAC Live Connection
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to set up SAP IAS/IPS as a proxy with Azure and subsequently establish a connection from SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) using Live Connections CORS to a HANA On-Premise database.

What would be the most effective approach to accomplish this? Additionally,What I'm is the best method to synchronize users from the HANA database to SAC.

Thank you in advance

Best Regards

entry.title: SAC and SharePoint connection
entry.content:
What is the best practice to share the SharePoint connection to users in SAC?

Is it possible to setup a universal SharePoint connection to a specific top SharePoint folder in the way that users having rights to use that connection won't have access to the whole content of that folder but only to folders shared with them within the top folder?

entry.title: Am not able to see S4HANA Public Cloud Connection from AFO
entry.content:
Hello Everyone
we have been trying to analyze connectivity from AFO(version 2.8.7)to Public Cloud(S4) Via SAC .
Since we were not able to directly see the Public Cloud views in SAC.
can anyone help me on this.

entry.title: Can I format a date dimension in SAC with a BW Live Connection?
entry.content:
We are using the SAC Live Connection with BW queries.

We discovered, that we can only use 0CALDAY und 0CALMONTH etc. for the date.

Unfortunatly the format for Q is eg 20241, 20242 etc. and for month 01.2024, 02.2024 etc.

This looks not very user frienly. We would like to have it like in 0CALMONTH2, where we have Q1, Q2, Q3 and JAN, FEB etc. But this is not supported as date in SAC, only as dimension. 

Is there any way to get another formats in the visualisation as live connection (see attached goal instead of current)?

entry.title: The data action couldn't run because of a problem with the data action trigger error in SAC
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I have created advanced script & running it from data action, getting the following error. Please help if anything wrong in code/configuration.
"The data action couldn't run because of a problem with the data action trigger. Please check its configuration."

Below is the script:

CONFIG.TIME_HIERARCHY = FISCALYEAR
CONFIG.GENERATE_UNBOOKED_DATA = OFF
 
MEMBERSET [d/Measures] = ("AmountTC", "AmountLC")
MEMBERSET [d/Date] = BASEMEMBER([d/Date], %DateInput%)
MEMBERSET [d/DATASOURCE] = "DS_PP_ACTUAL_R" 
MEMBERSET [d/COSTCENTER] = BASEMEMBER([d/COSTCENTER], %CostCenterInput%)
MEMBERSET [d/ENTITY] = "1110"
MEMBERSET [d/ACCOUNT] = "65200005"
 
IF [d/WBS] != "#" THEN
DATA([d/COSTCENTER] = [d/WBS].[p/RESP_CC]) = RESULTLOOKUP()
ENDIF
 



No records were generated if I run in trace mode.

Thanks.

entry.title: Edit Query Disabled from File server data source in Data Management SAC
entry.content:
Hello,

Edit Query Disabled from file server data source in Data Management SAC.

I have full control on Model and File server connection was shared with Edit rights to my profile. 

This is analytical model. Not sure why I am unable to edit the existing import job query.

Regards,

Vasu

entry.title: SAC BW live connection: Error Illegal State: data area already existing
entry.content:
Hi gurus,

I'm working in SAC MAN with a live connection to BW (BPC), and Stories (optimized) that used to work fine are now giving me random errors like getting stuck loading and not opening, but if I try a second time maybe it works.

To simplify and isolate the problem, I have created a simple story with two tables, each connected to a live model based on a BW query. When I save it and execute the story, I get an error on the screen saying to contact the administrator because the model information was not found. If I go to the browser console, I have this information:

2024-04-23T08:02:57.474Z [ERROR] Failed to create QM for [{"datasetId":"view:[_SYS_BIC][t.3][Cqv88q0nv7fh9o9dgej0kgois2e]"}], reason: Illegal State: Illegal State: data area already existing
at e [as constructor]

I tried with a new model on the same BW queries but the same issue persists. Also, I have also tried regenerating the query in RSRT. It is the development tenant in SAC with version 2024.2.21.

BW Live Connections is a BW on HANA system.

Do you have any idea about this error in the console?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SAP Queries/Infoset Queries data import to SAC (SAP ECC not on HANA)
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

we have a requirement to extract SAP Queries/Infosets from SAP ECC (on maxDB) to SAP Analytics Cloud? Does anyone have experience already with it and know the painpoints (example with the data import of InfoSet Queries, best practices and does/dont does?

Thanks in advance!

Best regards,

Regys

entry.title: Extract Stories using the rest api in SAC trial account
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am new to SAP Analytics Cloud. Need to get the details of Stories and Models from SAP Analytics Cloud using the REST APIs in the trial account. So far I could see, from the documentation, we have the rest apis available and with OAUTH authentication, which needs Administrator option for OAUTH client. 

Is there any other option available to execute REST APIs in a trial account ? Any help in this regard would be helpful.

Thanks,

Sreedhar Rusuma
